title: Associate Director, Trust Services
description:
[Your Role & Responsibilities]

  • Support the Director, Head of Trust in overseeing the daily operations of the Trust Administration department, including the day-to-day trust administration, operational controls, regulatory compliance, and internal processes.
  • Contribute to departmental strategy, ideas, and continuous process improvements to enhance client service delivery.
  • Provide leadership, guidance, and mentoring to trust professionals to strengthen team capability and professional development.
  • Acts as a primary point of contact for designated trust clients, ensuring high service standards and timely responses to client inquiries.
  • Manage and oversee the day-to-day administration of trust accounts, including but not limited to opening new bank or brokerage accounts, distribution to beneficiaries, fund transfer, and investment management.
  • Carry out periodic reviews of assigned trust portfolios to ensure proper administration and identify potential risks.
  • Maintaining accurate, complete, and updated trust records and documentation.
  • Client data system management including but not limited to creating Viewpoint Master files, set up and upload all trust documents into ViewPoint and on-going maintenance of all necessary principal records and trust files.
  • Draft and review trustee minutes, resolutions, agreements, and other trust‑related documents.
  • Collaborate with professional advisors, investment managers and banks in the management of the assets of the trusts and foundations.
  • Work closely with other departments to coordinate services for clients.
  • Debtor management – ensure invoicing and debtor collection on timely manner.
  • Ensure compliance with MAS regulations, trust legislation, AML/CFT requirements, and internal risk‑management procedures.
  • Support periodic audits and regulatory reviews (whenever required).

[What We Are Looking For]

[Education]

  • Bachelor's degree in business administration, law, finance, accounting, or relevant field

[Skills & Experience]

  • Minimum 15 years of Trust Administration experience, including supervisory or managerial experience.
  • Strong technical knowledge of relevant trust laws and regulations related to trusts, estate planning, taxation, and fiduciary responsibilities.
  • Strong analytical skills, attention to detail, and problem-solving abilities.
  • Strong interpersonal and leadership abilities, with proven experience mentoring, coaching, and developing team members.
  • Excellent communication skills, both written and verbal.
  • High level of integrity, discretion, and commitment to confidentiality in handling sensitive client data.
  • STEP qualification will be an added advantage

[Traits]

  • Client-Focused: You are dedicated in providing excellent service and ensuring client satisfaction.
  • Detail-Oriented & Organised: You excel at managing multiple tasks with precision and care.
  • Leadership & Guidance: The ability to lead a team of trust personnel and provide guidance to all team members.

[What We Offer]

  • Professional Growth – We value commitment and provide opportunities for professional development, industry exposure and professional memberships.
  • Competitive Compensation – Structured salary package with annual reviews, discretionary performance bonuses and a fixed bonus.
  • Flexible Work – Hybrid model with remote options giving you autonomy while ensuring productivity.

We regret to inform you that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

postedCompany.description:
Kensington Trust Singapore Limited established its presence in Singapore in 2015. The company is part of the Kensington Trust Group that formed a strategic alliance with JTC Group (Jersey).

Trust services include assistance to help individuals, families, and businesses establish and administer the trusts. Our fiduciary role includes acting in the best interests of our clients, ensuring proper compliance are adhered to when managing and administering to the assets.

We may act in capacity as trustees, executors or administrators of estates, ensuring that assets are distributed according to the wishes or wills of the client or in accordance with legal requirements.

In August 2016, Kensington Trust Singapore Limited was granted a license by the Monetary Authority of Singapore to conduct trust business, offering specialised jurisdiction-specific fiduciary solutions.

Overview

To ensure a corporation thrives, we believe you need expertise not just in the day to day operations but also behind the scenes. Just like a skilled and dedicated landscape artist who can create an amazing sculptured garden, JTC Kensington has the know-how to nurture your corporate or fiduciary interests, ensuring a corporation or an entrepreneurial enterprise thrives.

With a hand-picked team of experienced professionals in the trust and fiduciary business, JTC Kensington can help you manage and administer cross border business activities; set up and administer private trusts; and provide corporate management and administrative services.

This leaves you and your management team free to concentrate on what you do best while we support you with how, where and when.

Our Mission

JTC Kensington aims to live up to its well-known namesake in the United Kingdom with its intricate formal gardens, squares, palaces and museums. Not just in its physical features but also in our depth of knowledge and understanding of the trust and fiduciary business.

Given the collective experience of our team, we have in-depth knowledge of structures and we work with advisors in the implementation of these structures. We understand the role of proper management as a pillar in sustaining long term relationships with clients. In this context, our operating philosophy centres on our commitment, hard work and dedication rather than number of clients or assets under administration.

In brief, our mission will be driven by a single-minded passion –

'Our Hands at Work' – and the proof will be seen in how we deliver on our projects.

Our Vision

We aim to be the preferred Trust Group with expertise and knowledge in understanding and fulfilling Clients needs; We nurture a culture deriving satisfaction from growing our Business and recognizing & rewarding our Employees.

Our Business Principles

We put our Clients First
We value our Employees
We enhance our Shareholders' value

Our Services

We help our clients achieve the success their business deserves. We take care of all their business corporate needs through our complete suite of Accounting, Payroll, and Corporate Secretarial services that covers all aspects of setup and ongoing company administration, and Trust and Trustee Services.

Visit our website at https://www.kensington-trust.com/our-services/ktg-services/
postedCompany.name: KENSINGTON TRUST SINGAPORE LIMITED

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
